subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Ancient Beauty, render thanks that thou art favoured with the special grace of the Spirit of the world and art confirmed and assisted in servitude at His Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خادم جمال قدم حمد کن که بعنایت خاصه روح عالم موفق و مویدی و بعبودیت آستان
